name: DynaVap - Titanium Tip
summary: The patented Titanium Tip includes 5 fins to aid in heat distribution and 3 helical channels for enhanced airflow.
description: The patented Titanium Tip includes 5 fins to aid in heat distribution and 3 helical channels for enhanced airflow. The adaptable Adjust-a-Bowl allows for effortless mini-dosing by adjusting the Titanium CCD to decrease the extraction chamber size. The stainless steel CCD can also be utilized (sold separately). *Compatible with all DynaVap devices, including the M. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
